hero.badge: Operational Intelligence Partner · SDVOSB · HUBZone · MBE · DBE · SBE
hero.sub: ARCG is a diagnosis-first operational intelligence firm. We find where your business is losing time, money, visibility, and accountability — then blueprint only what should actually be fixed. We do not automate broken logic.
hero.cta2: See How ARCG Diagnoses Operational Waste

problem.label: Where Operations Break
problem.h2: Most Businesses Do Not Know Where They Are Leaking
problem.sub: Revenue, time, accountability, and customer trust are bleeding out of invisible gaps — manual handoffs, no source of truth, reporting blind spots, firefighting culture, and automation stacked on broken logic.
problem.p1: Late responses, missed follow-ups, dropped intakes, and invoicing gaps silently burn margin. You cannot fix what you cannot see.
problem.p2: Every handoff between people, tools, and teams is a failure point. Most operations have never been mapped end-to-end.
problem.p3: Three dashboards, five spreadsheets, and a group chat is not visibility. It is operational fog with a decision-maker inside it.

whatwedo.label: How We Work
whatwedo.h2: Diagnose First. Blueprint Before Build. Implement Only What Should Exist.
whatwedo.sub: ARCG is an operational intelligence partner, not an automation shop. We find the waste, rank it by impact, design the future state, and then build in phases. The first deliverable is clarity, not software.
whatwedo.c1: We map your real workflows, expose bottlenecks, quantify where time and money leak, and identify what should be standardized, what should be automated, and what should remain human.
whatwedo.c2: Before any build, you receive a ranked blueprint: what to fix first, what to fix later, what to leave alone. Built around your constraints, not a generic playbook.
whatwedo.c3: We implement only the approved scope, in sequence — stabilizing each layer before the next. No stacked automation on broken logic. Ever.

whoWeHelp.label: Who We Help
whoWeHelp.h2: Built for Operators Who Are Done Running Things Manually
whoWeHelp.p1: You're running the business and running the operations. Every manual task you do is a task that should be automated.
whoWeHelp.f1: We build the intake, scheduling, follow-up, and reporting systems that let you run the business without being the system.
whoWeHelp.p2: You manage 10+ properties. Dispatch is manual. Vendor no-shows reach clients before they reach you.
whoWeHelp.f2: We automate intake, dispatch, confirmation loops, and SLA tracking across all your locations.
whoWeHelp.p3: You're getting leads but losing them to slow response times. Follow-up depends on whoever remembers to do it.
whoWeHelp.f3: We build automated response and follow-up sequences so no lead goes unanswered, day or night.
whoWeHelp.p4: Your SAM.gov is active but your operation isn't set up to win bids or perform on contract.
whoWeHelp.f4: We build the compliance infrastructure, capability statements, and operational systems that win contracts and deliver on them.
whoWeHelp.p5: You run property management, resort operations, or staffing in the Dominican Republic, Puerto Rico, or across the Caribbean and Latin America.
whoWeHelp.f5: We build AI automation and operational systems designed for your market — guest services, vendor coordination, staffing workflows, and booking systems built for island and regional operations.

beforeAfter.label: Before / After
beforeAfter.h2: What Changes When ARCG Builds Your System
beforeAfter.b1: Leads come in through text, email, and phone — you lose half of them
beforeAfter.b2: Coordinator manually assigns jobs one at a time
beforeAfter.b3: No-shows discovered when clients call to complain
beforeAfter.b4: Weekly reporting takes 3 hours to compile manually
beforeAfter.b5: You are the system — nothing runs without you
beforeAfter.a1: Every inbound lead gets an automated response within seconds, 24/7
beforeAfter.a2: Jobs are routed and dispatched automatically based on type, location, and priority
beforeAfter.a3: Vendor confirmation loop triggers escalation before a no-show reaches a client
beforeAfter.a4: Weekly reports generated and delivered automatically every Monday
beforeAfter.a5: Operation runs from a dashboard — not from you personally

howItWorks.label: The Approach
howItWorks.h2: Diagnose → Prioritize → Design → Build → Test → Launch → Stabilize → Expand
howItWorks.s1: We map your real operation — intake, handoffs, reporting, accountability gaps, and revenue leakage. We expose where waste is happening and what is causing it.
howItWorks.s2: We rank every finding by impact and rebuild-readiness, then deliver a written blueprint: what to standardize, what to automate, what to leave human, and what to cut entirely.
howItWorks.s3: We implement the approved scope in sequence — stabilizing each layer before expanding. No big-bang rebuilds. No automation layered on broken logic.

outcomes.label: Outcomes
outcomes.h2: What You Get When the System Is Running
outcomes.o1: Every inbound inquiry handled in seconds, not hours. Around the clock.
outcomes.o2: Automated scheduling and dispatch increases throughput without increasing headcount.
outcomes.o3: Routing, follow-up, and reporting run without coordinator involvement.
outcomes.o4: Live dashboard shows job status, SLA compliance, and performance — no status calls needed.

cta.label: Start With a Free Triage Call
cta.sub: Book a short triage call. We will identify the most visible operational waste in your business and show you how ARCG would diagnose, blueprint, and fix it. No pitch. No obligation.

federalAccess.heroPara: ARCG is certified and active on SAM.gov. We bring SDVOSB, HUBZone, MBE, DBE, and SBE certifications to every teaming arrangement — and the operational infrastructure to perform on contract.
federalAccess.primeH2: A Certified Subcontractor Partner For Every Prime We Team With
federalAccess.primePara: We bring certifications, systems, and execution to every arrangement. You bring the opportunity.
federalAccess.pn1detail: We hold active SDVOSB, HUBZone, MBE, DBE, and SBE certifications — ready to satisfy subcontracting plan requirements on federally-funded contracts.
federalAccess.pn2detail: We extend your service range into AI automation, facilities management, compliance reporting, and language services without adding internal headcount.
federalAccess.pn3detail: We don't just satisfy a certification box — we build and run operational systems that perform. On-time delivery is our baseline.
federalAccess.pn4detail: We maintain current SAM.gov registration, all certifications, insurance, and documentation needed to move from award to execution without delays.
federalAccess.warnBody: We do not chase certifications we haven't earned, promise work we can't deliver, or enter teaming arrangements as a passive certificate holder. Every engagement requires operational contribution from ARCG.
federalAccess.sec1body: ARCG maintains active SAM.gov registration with UEI KPHJM83ZJLJ4 and CAGE code 8FJ78. All certifications are current, verified, and available for immediate inclusion in teaming agreements and subcontracting plans.
sec1pts: SDVOSB certified — Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business
HUBZone certified — Hyattsville, MD principal office
MBE, DBE, and SBE certified across Maryland and federal programs
federalAccess.sec2body: Prime contractors working with ARCG gain access to five simultaneous set-aside certifications — satisfying multiple subcontracting plan requirements with a single teaming partner.
federalAccess.sec3body: ARCG builds your proposal and capability assets — not advises on them. That means a structured capability statement formatted for federal evaluators, proposal sections compliant with Section L and M requirements, and positioning language calibrated to what contracting officers actually score.
sec3pts: Federal capability statement — formatted for evaluation
Proposal section writing — Section L and M compliant
Past performance narratives built from documented project data
Positioning language calibrated for evaluation criteria and scoring
Technical volume structure aligned to solicitation requirements
federalAccess.sec4body: ARCG pursues contracts through multiple federal channels — direct agency awards, small business set-asides, IDIQ task orders, and teaming arrangements with prime contractors on large-scale opportunities.
sec4pts: Small business set-aside contracts — direct agency awards
Subcontract positions on large prime awards
IDIQ task order competition under existing contract vehicles
State and local government procurement through DBE/MBE programs
federalAccess.who1text: You need a certified subcontractor to satisfy set-aside requirements on a federal award. We bring five certifications, operational systems, and a track record — not a paper partner.
federalAccess.who2text: You have certifications but no federal operational infrastructure. We build the capability statement, proposal systems, and compliance documentation that wins contracts.
federalAccess.who3text: You need AI automation, facilities management, or compliance reporting added to your service offering. We deliver as a subcontractor or teaming partner — without you adding internal staff.
federalAccess.closePara: Tell us about your contract scope and we'll identify exactly where ARCG fits — certifications, capabilities, and delivery model.
federalAccess.closeFoot: Active on SAM.gov · UEI KPHJM83ZJLJ4 · CAGE 8FJ78
federalAccess.certHUBZonenote: 10% price evaluation preference on full-and-open competitions
federalAccess.certDBEnote: Required participation on federally funded transportation projects
federalAccess.certMBEnote: State and local government procurement preference programs
federalAccess.certSBEnote: Subcontracting plan compliance for prime contractors

capabilities.dba: ARCG Systems — Ariel's River Contracting Group LLC
capabilities.heroPara: Every service ARCG delivers is backed by active federal certifications, verified operational systems, and a track record of execution across commercial and government clients.
capabilities.capH2: What We Build, Deploy, and Operate
capabilities.cap1body: We deploy AI-powered intake, lead response, and qualification systems that operate 24/7 — eliminating manual follow-up and pushing ready-to-close prospects into your pipeline.
capabilities.cap2body: We build automated reporting systems that compile, format, and deliver performance data on a fixed schedule — no manual compilation, no missed deadlines.
capabilities.cap3body: Vendor dispatch, scheduling, SLA tracking, and service coordination managed as an integrated system across multiple locations.
capabilities.cap4body: SAM.gov compliance maintenance, capability statement development, subcontracting plan documentation, and proposal system build-out for government contractors.
capabilities.cap5body: Structured data intake, processing pipelines, and CRM integration that eliminate manual entry and ensure accurate, real-time operational visibility.
capabilities.cap6body: We structure teaming arrangements, write subcontract agreements, and position ARCG's certifications within prime-contractor bids to satisfy set-aside requirements.
capabilities.diffH2: What Sets Us Apart From Every Other Consulting Firm
capabilities.d1body: Every engagement starts with diagnosis, ends with a blueprint, and only then moves to phased build. You get clarity, not a generic deliverable.
capabilities.d2body: SDVOSB, HUBZone, MBE, DBE, and SBE. All current. All documented. Available for immediate inclusion in teaming arrangements and subcontracting plans.
capabilities.d3body: We operate remotely without sacrificing execution quality. Every system we blueprint is designed to run without on-site presence, which is how we serve clients across the country and internationally.
capabilities.d4body: No open-ended retainers. Every engagement is scoped and sequenced after diagnosis so you know exactly what will be fixed, in what order, and what the dependencies are.
capabilities.teamPara: We bring five active certifications and the operational systems to perform on contract. Tell us what you're working on and we'll identify exactly how ARCG fits.

solution.sub: Every engagement is built around operational outcomes — not deliverables. We build the system, run it, and optimize it.
solution.notFoundSub: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
solution.buildPlanH2b: Where This Fits in Your Operation?
solution.buildPlanSub: Book a free triage call. We will identify where your operation is leaking and show you what a diagnosis, blueprint, and phased build would look like.
solution.fs_desc: We manage vendor dispatch, work order routing, SLA tracking, and service coordination across your entire portfolio — as one integrated operational system, not a patchwork of manual processes.
solution.fs_f1: Automated vendor dispatch and job routing based on type, location, and priority
solution.fs_f2: SLA tracking with escalation alerts before client-facing failures occur
solution.fs_f3: Vendor confirmation loops that eliminate no-shows before they happen
solution.fs_f4: Real-time dashboard showing job status, completion rates, and performance metrics
solution.fs_f5: Weekly automated reporting delivered to property owners without manual compilation
solution.fs_audience: Property management companies, facility operators, and service businesses managing multiple locations or vendors who need visibility and control without adding coordinator headcount.
solution.cr_desc: We build automated compliance reporting systems that track deadlines, compile required documentation, and deliver formatted reports on schedule — eliminating manual reporting cycles and audit risk.
solution.cr_f1: Automated report generation and delivery on fixed schedules
solution.cr_f2: Compliance deadline tracking with proactive alerts
solution.cr_f3: Document compilation and formatting for regulatory submissions
solution.cr_f5: Dashboard view of compliance status across all reporting obligations
solution.cr_audience: Government contractors, regulated businesses, property management companies, and any operation with recurring compliance reporting requirements.
solution.cr_stat_ctx: No more missed deadlines or manual report compilation
solution.ti_desc: Clear communication across languages is a critical operational requirement. ARCG provides certified translation of technical, legal, and operational documents, alongside on-demand interpreting services for critical engagements.
solution.ti_f1: Certified document translation — legal, technical, and operational
solution.ti_f2: On-demand interpreting for negotiations, meetings, and calls
solution.ti_f3: Multilingual capability statements and government submission documents
solution.ti_f4: ASL interpreting services for federally-mandated accessibility compliance
solution.ti_f5: Quality-reviewed translations with subject-matter accuracy verification
solution.ti_audience: Legal firms, healthcare providers, government contractors, and multinational operators requiring certified language services for compliance, operations, or client communication.

cr.heroPara: Regulatory compliance isn't optional — but compiling the data manually is a waste of resources. ARCG builds automated systems that capture operational data at the source, format it into audit-ready reports, and deliver them on schedule. No coordinator. No scramble.
cr.probH2: Manual Compliance Is a Liability, Not a Process
cr.probPara: Most organizations treat compliance reporting as a periodic task — something that gets done when an audit looms. That model fails. Regulators don't give notice. Auditors don't wait while you compile documentation.
cr.pb1: Compliance data lives in spreadsheets, emails, and paper forms
cr.pa1: All compliance data centralized, structured, and searchable in one system
cr.pb2: Audit requests trigger a 3-day scramble to compile documentation
cr.pa2: Audit packages assembled in minutes from a continuously maintained archive
cr.pb3: Expired certifications discovered by the auditor, not by you
cr.pa3: Expiration alerts fire 60, 30, and 7 days out — nothing lapses undetected
cr.pb4: Weekly compliance reports take hours to prepare manually
cr.pa4: Reports generated automatically on schedule, delivered without human effort
cr.warnTitle: Compliance Is Not a Documentation Problem — It Is a Systems Problem
cr.warnBody: The organizations that fail audits don't lack the underlying compliance data. They lack the systems to capture it continuously, format it correctly, and produce it on demand. ARCG builds that system — so your compliance posture is always current, not reconstructed after the fact.
cr.f1body: Field data flows directly into structured records without manual entry. Every inspection, service event, and operational touchpoint captured automatically.
cr.f2body: OSHA, EPA, and contract-mandated forms populated from your operational data in real time. No re-entering information that already exists in your systems.
cr.f3body: Every compliance event timestamped, attributed, and stored in a tamper-evident digital record. Audit requests answered in minutes, not days.
cr.f4body: Live view of your compliance posture across all regulated areas. Status, gaps, and pending items visible at a glance — no report requests needed.
cr.f5body: Automated triggers when certifications are expiring, inspections are overdue, or required documentation hasn't been received. You know before the auditor does.
cr.f6body: Performance reports against contract-mandated metrics generated automatically. Delivered to the right recipients on the right schedule — without coordinator effort.
cr.step01body: We wire data capture directly into your existing field operations — inspections, service completions, certifications. Data flows into the compliance system the moment the event occurs. No re-entry.
cr.step02body: Raw operational data is automatically formatted into the specific structures required by OSHA, EPA, FAR, and your contract mandates. The system knows the form — you don't have to.
cr.step03body: Every compliance record is timestamped, attributed to the responsible party, and stored in a tamper-evident digital archive. Pull any record for any period in seconds.
cr.step04body: Continuous monitoring against your compliance obligations. Expirations, gaps, and overdue items trigger alerts before they become violations.
cr.step05body: Compliance reports delivered to the right recipients — contracting officers, agency contacts, internal leadership — on the schedule your contracts require. No manual assembly.
cr.w1text: SDVOSB, HUBZone, and other certified firms operating under FAR-mandated reporting requirements. ARCG builds the infrastructure that makes contract performance reporting automatic.
cr.w2text: Property managers and facilities contractors with OSHA, EPA, or building code compliance obligations across multiple locations. One system across all sites.
cr.w3text: Regulated environments where documentation gaps carry legal and financial liability. ARCG builds systems that make compliance a background function, not a manual burden.
cr.closePara: Tell us about your regulatory environment and we'll map the automation architecture that makes your compliance posture continuous — not reactive.
cr.closeFoot: Diagnosis before build · Blueprint before software

fs.heroPara: Multiple vendors create gaps, delays, and accountability issues. ARCG acts as your single accountable operator for pest control, janitorial, groundskeeping, and staffing — deploying certified teams that maintain your assets to government standards, with complete service documentation and one consolidated reporting structure.
fs.probH2: Vendor Fragmentation Is a Performance Risk
fs.probPara: Most facilities portfolios run on 3–7 separate vendor relationships for services that should function as one coordinated system. The gaps between vendors are where failures happen — and where accountability disappears.
fs.pb1: 5 vendors, 5 invoices, 5 phone trees when something goes wrong
fs.pa1: One accountable operator — one call, one invoice, one reporting structure
fs.pb2: Vendor no-shows discovered when the client calls to complain
fs.pa2: Automated confirmation loops catch no-shows before they reach your client
fs.pb3: Compliance documentation assembled manually before contract audits
fs.pa3: Service records maintained continuously, audit-ready at any time
fs.pb4: No visibility into whether scheduled services actually happened
fs.pa4: Live dashboard shows every service event — completed, pending, or escalated
fs.certTitle: Certified for Government Facilities — SDVOSB · HUBZone · MBE · DBE · SBE
fs.certBody: ARCG holds five active federal certifications, qualifying for set-aside facilities contracts and satisfying prime contractor small business participation requirements. Active SAM.gov registrant — UEI KPHJM83ZJLJ4 · CAGE 8FJ78.
fs.sv1body: Government-standard cleaning protocols for commercial, industrial, and institutional facilities. Scheduled, documented, and consistently delivered by vetted crews.
fs.sv2body: IPM-certified pest control aligned to federal and state environmental standards. Service documentation maintained for regulatory compliance and contract reporting.
fs.sv3body: Qualified personnel placed for facilities management, concierge, security support, and maintenance coordination roles. Screened, trained, and operationally ready.
fs.sv4body: Structured PM programs for mechanical, electrical, and structural building systems. Scheduled proactively — not triggered by failure. Maintenance records maintained for compliance.
fs.sv5body: Single invoice. Single point of contact. All service lines consolidated into unified reporting that satisfies contract requirements and ownership reporting standards.
fs.sv6body: Every service order tracked against committed timeframes. Response times, completion rates, and exception logs visible in a live dashboard — for you and your stakeholders.
fs.h01body: ARCG is the prime operator — not a coordinator passing work to subcontractors without oversight. We are responsible for performance, documentation, and escalation across every service line.
fs.h02body: Service orders dispatched automatically based on schedule, location, and priority. Confirmation loops fire before scheduled visits. No-show escalation triggers before the client is aware of a problem.
fs.h03body: Every service event documented with timestamp, crew attribution, and condition notes. Records maintained in audit-ready format for OSHA, EPA, and contract compliance reviews.
fs.h04body: Real-time visibility into service completion status, SLA compliance, and open exceptions. No status calls required — the data is always current.
fs.w1text: Single-family, multi-family, and commercial portfolios requiring reliable, documented maintenance across multiple locations. ARCG consolidates vendor management into one accountable operator.
fs.w2text: Federal, state, and municipal facilities with strict maintenance standards and documentation requirements. ARCG holds SDVOSB and HUBZone certifications, qualifying for set-aside contracts.
fs.w3text: Corporate and institutional campuses requiring coordinated janitorial, pest control, and maintenance coverage across large footprints. Standardized protocols across every site.
fs.closePara: Tell us about your facilities portfolio and we'll map exactly how ARCG consolidates your service lines into one system — with full documentation and live performance visibility.
fs.closeFoot: SDVOSB · HUBZone · MBE · DBE · SBE · Active SAM.gov Registrant

assessment.sub: This intake feeds your Operational Waste Diagnostic. Share operating detail before the triage call — we map the workflows, score the waste, and blueprint only what should actually be fixed. Clarity first. Software second.

diagnostics.sub: ARCG is a diagnosis-first operational intelligence firm. We map your real workflows, expose the breakdowns, rank every finding by revenue impact — and then blueprint only what should actually be fixed. We do not automate broken logic.
diagnostics.statsLabel: The first deliverable is clarity, not software.
diagnostics.guardH2: Never Automate Broken Logic Just Because the Client Wants Speed.
diagnostics.guardSub: The first step is not software. The first step is clarity — deciding what should be standardized, what should be automated, and what should remain human. That decision cannot be made without a diagnostic.
diagnostics.pillarsSub: Every ARCG diagnostic produces a concrete output — not a conversation. You receive a documented diagnosis, a scored findings list, a formal blueprint, and an approved phase plan before a single integration is built.
diagnostics.p1desc: We map your real workflows across six core diagnostic flows — intake, handoffs, reporting, accountability gaps, and revenue leakage. Every breakdown documented, not assumed.
diagnostics.p2desc: Every finding scored by Revenue Impact (30%), Operational Pain (25%), Frequency (20%), Ease (10%), and Dependency (15%). Ranked list built around your actual constraints.
diagnostics.p3desc: Before any build, you receive a written blueprint: current-state diagnosis, root-cause analysis, future-state model, automation map, data model, KPI plan, and a phased implementation sequence.
diagnostics.p4desc: We implement only the approved scope. Immediate Fixes first. Core System Build second. Expansion only after stability. No stacked automation on broken logic. No big-bang rebuilds.
diagnostics.processSub: Clarity before software. Blueprint before build. Phased execution only after diagnosis.
diagnostics.s1desc: We map your real operation — intake, handoffs, reporting, accountability gaps, and revenue leakage across six core diagnostic flows. We expose where waste is happening and identify the root cause, not just the symptom.
diagnostics.s2desc: Every finding is scored by revenue impact, operational pain, frequency, and dependency. Findings are sorted into Immediate Fixes, Core System Build, and Expansion Layer. You receive a formal written blueprint before any build begins.
diagnostics.s3desc: We implement only the approved scope. Immediate Fixes first — stopping obvious leakage. Core System Build second — the foundational workflows. Expansion only after the core runs clean. Each layer stabilizes before the next begins.
diagnostics.flowsSub: Every operation is diagnosed through the same six-flow lens — ensuring consistency, speed, and zero blind spots.
diagnostics.f1q: What triggers the next step? Who owns it? What happens when it fails?
diagnostics.f2q: How fast is first response? What happens to unqualified leads?
diagnostics.f3q: How is work assigned? How are completions confirmed? How are escalations handled?
diagnostics.f4q: Where does accountability disappear between people and teams?
diagnostics.f5q: Can leadership see open work, overdue tasks, and pipeline in one place?
diagnostics.f6q: What triggers billing? Where does invoicing disconnect from delivery?
diagnostics.ctaSub: Share operating detail before a triage call. We map your workflows, score the waste, and show you what a blueprint and phased build would look like. No commitment. No pitch.
